message:
feat(fp-frame): implement 15 new Series methods, 4 new DataFrame methods, and fix pandas conformance in groupby/types

This is a large feature and correctness commit that substantially expands the
pandas API surface coverage in fp-frame, fixes several pandas-conformance
issues in fp-groupby and fp-types, and applies rustfmt formatting fixes across
fp-io and fp-join.

## New Series methods (fp-frame)

- unique(): return unique non-null values in first-seen order (pd.Series.unique)
- nunique(): count of unique non-null values (pd.Series.nunique)
- map(mapping): dict-like value mapping, unmapped values become NaN (pd.Series.map)
- replace(replacements): substitute specific values with replacements (pd.Series.replace)
- quantile(q): compute a single quantile using linear interpolation (pd.Series.quantile)
- clip(lower, upper): bound values to a [lower, upper] range (pd.Series.clip)
- abs(): element-wise absolute value (pd.Series.abs)
- round(decimals): round to N decimal places (pd.Series.round)
- shift(periods): shift values forward/backward, filling with NaN (pd.Series.shift)
- diff(periods): element-wise difference with predecessor (pd.Series.diff)
- cumsum(): cumulative sum, skipping NaN (pd.Series.cumsum)
- cumprod(): cumulative product, skipping NaN (pd.Series.cumprod)
- cummin(): cumulative minimum, skipping NaN (pd.Series.cummin)
- cummax(): cumulative maximum, skipping NaN (pd.Series.cummax)

All new Series methods include helper function percentile_linear_series() for
quantile computation using pandas' default linear interpolation method.

## New DataFrame methods (fp-frame)

- describe(): summary statistics (count/mean/std/min/25%/50%/75%/max) for
  numeric columns, matching pd.DataFrame.describe() output shape and semantics.
  Includes helper percentile_linear() for quantile computation.
- quantile(q): compute a single quantile for each numeric column, returning
  a Series indexed by column names (pd.DataFrame.quantile)
- apply(func, axis): apply a named aggregation function along axis 0
  (column-wise) or axis 1 (row-wise), supporting sum/mean/min/max/std/var/
  median/count (pd.DataFrame.apply)
- transpose(): swap rows and columns, converting index labels to column names
  and column names to index labels (pd.DataFrame.T / pd.DataFrame.transpose)

## Pandas conformance fixes (fp-groupby)

- GroupBy first()/last() aggregations now return NaN (not Null) for empty
  groups, matching pandas' null sentinel behavior.
- GroupBy first()/last() now promote Int64 values to Float64, matching pandas'
  behavior of promoting integer columns to float for NaN compatibility in
  aggregation results.
- HyperLogLog sentinel computation reformatted for clarity (no logic change).

## Type system fix (fp-types)

- cast_scalar_owned() for DType::Utf8 target now returns InvalidCast error
  instead of attempting Bool/Int64/Float64-to-string conversion. This removes
  an implicit coercion path that diverged from pandas' stricter casting rules.
- nanmedian() now uses is_multiple_of(2) instead of modulo check, per Rust
  nightly/clippy idiom.

## Formatting fixes (fp-io, fp-join)

- Applied rustfmt to read_csv_str(), write_csv_string(), and
  read_csv_with_options() in fp-io (line-wrapping only, no logic changes).
- Applied rustfmt to estimate_output_rows() closure in fp-join (line-wrapping
  only, no logic changes).
- Minor whitespace fix in DataFrame::rename() formatting.

## Attestation artifacts refresh

- Regenerated compat_closure_attestation_summary.json and
  compat_closure_final_evidence_pack.json with updated timestamps and
  SHA-256 signatures reflecting the current codebase state.

## Tests added (20 new test functions)

Series tests:
- series_unique_returns_first_seen_order_skipping_nulls
- series_unique_empty_series
- series_nunique_counts_distinct_non_null
- series_shift_positive / series_shift_negative
- series_diff_basic
- series_cumsum_skips_nan
- series_cumprod_basic
- series_cummin_cummax_basic
- series_map_replaces_and_fills_nan
- series_replace_substitutes_values
- series_quantile_median
- series_clip_bounds_values
- series_abs_and_round

DataFrame tests:
- dataframe_quantile_basic
- dataframe_apply_column_wise / dataframe_apply_row_wise
- dataframe_describe_basic / dataframe_describe_skips_non_numeric
- dataframe_transpose_basic

Existing tests (series_astype_casts_and_preserves_index,
series_astype_rejects_invalid_cast, series_min_max_basic) were relocated
within the test module but are functionally unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -204,7 +204,12 @@ fn estimate_output_rows(
                 .index()
                 .labels()
                 .iter()
-                .filter(|label| !left_map.as_ref().expect("Outer needs left_map").contains_key(*label))
+                .filter(|label| {
+                    !left_map
+                        .as_ref()
+                        .expect("Outer needs left_map")
+                        .contains_key(*label)
+                })
                 .count();
             left_matched + right_unmatched
         }
